mapper.insert: INSERT INTO audit_log ( action, target_type, target_id, operator_id, request_ip, before_value, after_value, result, trace_id ) VALUES ( #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CAST(#{operatorId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS uuid), CAST(#{requestIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS inet), CAST(#{beforeValueJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), CAST(#{afterValueJson,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS jsonb), #{result}, #{traceId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
